title: scrophularia nervosa
intro: Scrophularia nervosa, also known as Nerve Root or Nervine, is a perennial herbaceous plant belonging to the figwort family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scrophularia nervosa include its ability to alleviate anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and support the nervous system. Scrophularia nervosa is typically prepared as a tincture, tea, or infusion, and can also be found in capsule or powder form, allowing users to choose the best method for their needs.
